benefits.description: Elbow tendonitis recovery; improved from 7/10 pain unable to lift coffee flask to 95% recovery with only minor tweak on grip

protocol_notes: Local subcutaneous injections to forearm above flexor and medial head of tricep. Used insulin pins and clinell wipes from Amazon. Cost approximately £40 for 2 weeks. Reduced gym volume, switched movements (safety squat bar vs low bar), continued boxing once weekly and golfing twice weekly. Continued ice daily and theragun use. Had tried acupuncture, osteopath, rehab exercises, theragun/ART prior without success.
